title: entitlements — compliance evidence
description: Enterprise-contract override history is the primary compliance surface. SOX 404 for metered-billing usage evidence. GDPR Art. 30 for records of processing where entitlements reflect contractual terms.

controls.evidence: EntitlementUsage rows for is_metered_billing=true entitlements retained 7y. UsageReportedToBilling events audit-logged with provider_usage_record_id for cross-check against Stripe/Paddle.
HasAudit on Entitlement captures every override event. Correlates to workspace's data-processing agreement.
EntitlementUsage retention 30-365d per plan. Metered-billing rows exception (7y SOX).
Cascade delete on WorkspaceErased. Metered rows anonymise (workspace_id hashed) rather than delete for SOX continuity.
Platform-admin override permission gated + audit-logged. Every override produces a compliance audit row.
Reconciliation job detects Redis-Postgres drift. Metrics dashboard alerts on drift > 100 per key.
